description: Eòlas extracted metadata schema. Defines the named fields the AI extraction pipeline produces and the conditional workflow engine can evaluate. Fields may be absent on any given document — JSON Logic treats missing keys as null.

amounts.description: Numeric monetary amounts extracted from the document text, sorted descending. Currency symbols are stripped; see the 'currency' field.

currency.description: ISO currency code of the most frequently occurring monetary amount (e.g. GBP, USD, EUR).

effective_date.description: The earliest concrete date found in the document, normalised to YYYY-MM-DD. Relative dates ('next week', 'yesterday') are excluded.

parties.description: Organisations and named individuals mentioned in the document. Deduplicated, title-cased, capped at 20 entries.

jurisdiction.description: The most frequently mentioned geopolitical entity (country, state, city). Represents the likely legal or operational jurisdiction.

document_number.description: A structured document reference number matching common enterprise patterns (DOC-nnn, INV-nnn, PO-nnn, REF-nnn, CASE-nnn, CONTRACT-nnn).
